HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to a full vehicle history check

steps.title: Enter the VIN and listing URL
steps.body: Fill in a simple form with the car’s VIN and a link to the listing. It takes less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: Pay for the analysis
steps.body: Secure payment with Stripe. We support major methods — cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay.

steps.title: Receive a detailed report
steps.body: Within 24 hours of successful payment you’ll get a full analysis report with an expert verdict and concrete recommendations.

HowItWorks.ctaHeadline: Get full car analysis within 24 hours
